name: Big Giant Swords
overview: No one makes big, bad, gigantic swords like Michael Craughwell, and he's putting it all on the line to make his passion a profession. Joined by a motley crew of artists and builders, this master of steel will attempt to bring the stuff of legends to life.

trailers.title: Sneak Peek: BIG GIANT SWORDS | New Series - Tue Jan 13 10/9c
